purpose: Machine-readable evidence locks and boundary cost matrix for the V Rising DLSS playable-MVP route.

evidence: dlss-user-rendering-no-evaluate r1-r4 regressed performance without NGX evaluate.
cached-driver-no-evaluate recovered near-baseline performance after broad GetTexture stopped.
evidenceLocks.allowedChallenge: Only a bounded, non-steady-state discovery probe with explicit call budget and performance guard may challenge this lock.

evidence: cached-driver evaluate reached DLSS success but crashed in nvwgf2umx.dll before gameplay proof.
evidenceLocks.allowedChallenge: Only after a new command-buffer/evaluate boundary removes the DynamicResolutionHandler.Update evaluate submission shape.

evidence: Local native-stub audit reports DLSSPass setup/create/render bodies as inert while DoDLSSPass shell remains non-stub-like.
evidenceLocks.allowedChallenge: Only new local evidence that V Rising's built-in DLSSPass body is no longer inert may challenge this lock.

evidence: Prior diagnostic-pass gameplay route crashed in coreclr before a useful render-function log.
evidenceLocks.allowedChallenge: Only a separate no-native stability proof may reopen this as research, not as the normal route.

evidence: official-flags paired user-rendering 1080p run proved clean evaluate with RenderGraph.GetTexture=0 but average FPS regressed by 36.514 percent.
evidenceLocks.allowedChallenge: Only a changed boundary or changed cost layer may be tested; do not rerun the same EASU ctx.cmd shape as the next proof.

evidence: User-provided 5.5 plan and current performance data both require separating carrier, native validate, NGX create, scratch evaluate, copy, and visible write.
evidenceLocks.allowedChallenge: Visible write requires prior B-G cost layers to pass or a written exception explaining the new evidence.

boundaryCostMatrix.description: FSR Off, 1080p Windowed, protected 11111 fixture, PresentMon plus GPU/system snapshots.
Focused engine-owned EASU carrier evidence only; no native, no evaluate, no broad GetTexture.
Same-device D3D11 resource desc audit; no NGX init, no evaluate.
Issue one existing command-buffer plugin event with an empty native callback.
Initialize/create/reuse DLSS feature outside per-frame recreate loops; no evaluate.
Evaluate DLSS to scratch output; FinalPass does not consume the output.
Copy scratch to dummy first, then only later to EASU destination to isolate handoff cost.
Bind output to the visible EASU destination only after all no-write/copy layers pass.
Only the surviving candidate moves to 4K GPU-bound FSR Off baseline vs DLSS On product-value proof.
